description: Search files by content and/or filename. Returns matching lines with file:line:content format. Use only_files=true to just list files by name pattern (replaces search_files). Supports file_pattern (glob, e.g. '*.go') to filter by filename, path to limit search to a subdirectory, limit/max_matches (max matches, default 200), and context (lines of context before/after match). Example: {"pattern": "func.*Handler", "file_pattern": "*.go", "path": "./src"}
name: grep

pattern.description: Regex pattern to search for (in content mode). In only_files mode with no file_pattern, treated as file glob pattern.

only_files.description: If true, only return matching file paths (no content search). Use with file_pattern to find files by name. Replaces search_files.

file_pattern.description: Optional glob pattern to filter by filename (e.g. '*.go', '*_test.go'). Comma-separated for multiple patterns.

path.description: Subdirectory to search in (relative to work dir). Defaults to whole project

limit.description: Max matches (default 200, capped at 1000). Set 0 for unlimited

max_matches.description: Alias for limit. Max matches to return (default 200, capped at 1000)

context.description: Number of context lines to show before and after each match. Default 0.
